prestazioni: Engine swap to a Rover K-Series 1.8L VVC (engine code: 18K4F) with forged internals including Mahle Motorsport forged pistons (80.5mm bore, 12.5:1 CR), Eagle H-beam connecting rods, and a steel billet crankshaft. Paired with a custom 4-2-1 stainless steel exhaust manifold by Janspeed and a Pipercross Viper cold air intake system for optimized airflow.

Forced induction via a Garrett GT2860RS turbocharger (0.63 A/R turbine housing) with a custom intercooler setup by Bell Auto Services, featuring a front-mount Spearco IC-700 intercooler core. Boost controlled via a Turbosmart Comp-Gate40 wastegate and a custom ECU tune by DTAfast S80 Pro standalone ECU with launch control and flat-shift capabilities.

Suspension overhaul with Ohlins Road & Track DFV coilovers (adjustable damping, 150mm travel) and polybush kit by SuperPro (part no. SPF1001K). Braking system upgraded to AP Racing CP5220 front calipers with 280mm vented discs and Ferodo DS2500 pads, paired with Wilwood rear calipers and 220mm discs.
estetica: Full carbon fiber widebody conversion using a Mini Sport GT400 kit (front fenders, rear quarters, and rear bumper) with custom carbon fiber side skirts and a vented hood by Kaminari. Rear diffuser by Cobra Seats with integrated twin exhaust outlets for the Janspeed manifold.

Custom 13x6.5-inch Compomotive MO wheels (ET25 offset) wrapped in Toyo R888R tires (185/55R13). Wheel arches rolled and flared by a specialist using a Pro-Tools arch roller for a seamless fitment. Full respray in Rover Brooklands Green (code: 228) with a matte clear coat by PPG.

Interior stripped and fitted with a full T45 steel roll cage by Safety Devices (part no. SD010), Sparco Pro2000 seats with Schroth 6-point harnesses, and a Momo Mod.78 steering wheel on a NRG quick-release hub. Dashboard replaced with a custom carbon fiber panel housing a Stack ST800 digital dash and a Race Technology DL1 data logger.
